jsonLd.title: CRISIL is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
